text: name: DeFi Analytics Agent | description: Fetches and aggregates DeFi protocol metrics and TVL from public APIs. Produces summary reports for traders and researchers. | tags: DeFi,analytics,API,Python
name: DeFi Analytics Agent
description: Fetches and aggregates DeFi protocol metrics and TVL.

text: name: Research Summariser | description: Takes a topic or URL, performs web search, and uses an LLM to produce a structured summary with key points and sources. | tags: research,summarisation,search,Python
name: Research Summariser
description: Topic or URL to structured summary with sources.

text: name: Trading Signal Scanner | description: Monitors price and volume data from exchanges via API, applies configurable rules, and emits alerts. | tags: trading,alerts,API,real-time,Python
name: Trading Signal Scanner

text: name: Backtest Runner | description: Loads strategy parameters and historical OHLCV data, runs a backtest engine, and returns performance metrics and equity curve. | tags: backtesting,DeFi,trading,Python
name: Backtest Runner
description: Backtest strategies on historical OHLCV data.

text: name: On-Chain Metrics Fetcher | description: Queries blockchain RPC or indexer APIs for balances, transactions, and contract state. Aggregates into human-readable metrics. | tags: on-chain,blockchain,API,Python
name: On-Chain Metrics Fetcher

text: name: Multi-DEX Price Aggregator | description: Fetches spot prices from multiple DEX APIs, normalises pairs, and returns best bid/ask or aggregate mid. | tags: DeFi,DEX,aggregator,API,Python
name: Multi-DEX Price Aggregator

text: name: Risk Metrics Calculator | description: Computes risk metrics (e.g. VaR, drawdown, Sharpe) from a time series of returns or PnL. | tags: risk,metrics,analytics,Python
name: Risk Metrics Calculator
description: VaR, drawdown, Sharpe from return series.

text: name: Cybersecurity Briefing Agent | description: Searches for recent CVEs and security news on a given topic, then summarises findings for security teams. | tags: cybersecurity,research,CVE,Python
name: Cybersecurity Briefing Agent
description: CVE and security news search and summary.

text: name: Tutorial Generator | description: Given a topic, retrieves best practices and documentation, then produces a step-by-step tutorial. | tags: tutorial,documentation,how-to,Python
name: Tutorial Generator
description: Step-by-step tutorials from docs and best practices.

text: name: Real-Time Alert Dispatcher | description: Subscribes to events (e.g. webhooks or polling), filters by rules, and dispatches alerts to configurable outputs (e.g. webhook, log). | tags: alerts,real-time,webhook,Python
name: Real-Time Alert Dispatcher
description: Event subscription and rule-based alert dispatch.
